steps.title: Identify the plural subject
steps.content: The subject is “The trailblazing accomplishments of Goldin.” Although the parenthetical appositive “winner of the 2023 Nobel Prize...” provides information about Goldin, the head noun remains “accomplishments,” which is plural.

steps.title: Apply subject-verb agreement
steps.content: “Attest” is the plural verb form that agrees with the plural subject. The verbs “attests,” “has attested,” and “is attesting” are singular forms, which violate subject-verb agreement. That confirms B is correct.
